scientific_scope: ordered stoichiometric commensurate parent-to-child distortions with det(B)<=4 and at most two active OPD branches

abstract_level.supercell_rule: all upper HNFs with det(B)<=4 quotiented by parent rotations and unimodular row-basis changes
abstract_level.group_object: finite affine quotient G_parent^B/T_B with exact rotation and translation coset
abstract_level.representation_object: complete physically irreducible real representation of the finite affine quotient
abstract_level.opd_object: nonzero Reynolds fixed space with recomputed pointwise stabilizer modulo parent-domain conjugacy
abstract_level.equivalent_acceleration: enumerate the representation fixed-space lattice by vectorized PSD-kernel intersections instead of enumerating every abstract subgroup

parent_realization_level.occurrence_rule: retain only real irreps with positive multiplicity in the concrete parent Wyckoff displacement representation
parent_realization_level.displacement_representation: compact node permutation plus Cartesian 3x3 rotation

independent_audit.exhaustive_structure: all 230 parents and every canonical HNF orbit are reconstructed through the exact affine quotient
independent_audit.reference_cross_check: SG 221 Gamma polar Cartesian vector against spgrep-modulation

advancement_rule: H0-D-v2 qualifies only if the complete abstract atlas, parent-realization interface, reference panel and every required check pass. Otherwise stop before H0-E.
